This is the 'body' field - do not use 'comment_body' or other variations. Provide helpful, relevant information that adds value to the conversation."},"item_number":{"type":["number","string"],"description":"The issue, pull request, or discussion number to comment on. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 123 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/123). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error."},"temporary_id":{"type":"string","pattern":"^aw_[A-Za-z0-9]{3,12}$","description":"Unique temporary identifier for this comment. Use this to confirm workflow completion and provide visibility when analysis is complete but no changes or outputs are required (e.g., 'No issues found', 'All checks passed'). This ensures the workflow produces human-visible output even when no other actions are taken.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","required":["message"],"properties":{"message":{"type":"string","description":"Status or completion message to log. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). 2026-04-01T19:30:49.6485938Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-04-01T19:30:49.6486195Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-04-01T19:30:49.6486330Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-01T19:30:49.6486536Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-01T19:30:49.6486868Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-01T19:30:49.6486979Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-01T19:30:49.6487116Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-01T19:30:49.6487195Z [36;1melse[0m
